name: Cormiers Bus Svc
employees_est: ~19-29 (19 drivers per FMCSA, 29 employees per listing)
recent_news: DOT record (#1314161) shows operations active in Bangor/Corinth area; partnered with local PTO on Fill-A-Bus school supplies drive; one third-party listing flagged status as 'inactive' but driver LinkedIn profiles indicate continued operations.
fit_notes: Small single-yard family operator in rural central Maine serving RSU 64; sub-30-bus scale and possible activity uncertainty make it a marginal tuck-in - useful only as a route-tack-on if Summit builds a Maine cluster.

name: B C Transport Enterprises
districts_or_customers: NYC DOE / Office of Pupil Transportation (assumed, Queens-based)
recent_news: No M&A, ownership or news coverage located; company does not appear in NYSDOT 2021-22 or 2022-23 Bus Operator Profiles, suggesting either small scale, sub-contractor status, or DBA under another carrier.
fit_notes: Queens-based micro-operator with thin public footprint; likely a small sub-contractor to NYC OPT prime contractors (Consolidated, Reliant, Pioneer, etc.). Low standalone tuck-in value unless it holds direct OPT contract rights worth bolting onto a NYC platform.

name: Joseph Muccio Trnsprtn LLC
recent_news: Actively hiring CDL school-bus drivers for 2024-25 school year across multiple PA districts; expanded reach across Forest, McKean and Elk County districts. Related Muccio School Transportation (Anthony Muccio, St. Marys PA) appears to be a sister/affiliate operation, suggesting a multi-entity family business.
fit_notes: Family-owned multi-district operator across rural northwest PA with potential adjacent Muccio affiliates (St. Marys); attractive Summit tuck-in if combined with Anthony Muccio operations - would consolidate a regional PA cluster (~50-75 buses).

name: Sunshine City Bus Solutions
recent_news: No web, FMCSA, or Pinellas County Schools vendor references located. Pinellas County Schools self-operates 333 buses internally; St. Pete-area private school-bus contracting is limited. Company may be small charter/shuttle DBA rather than dedicated school-bus operator.
fit_notes: Inability to verify operations or school-district contracts is a red flag; Pinellas runs its own fleet so private school-bus tuck-in opportunity in St. Pete is structurally narrow. Deprioritize pending direct outreach confirmation.

name: Bolze Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: West Perry School District (Loysville/Perry County, PA - inferred)
recent_news: FMCSA DOT #2192791 active; no formal safety rating, no crashes recorded. No M&A activity. Sister/adjacent operator 'B & L Bus Service' (DOT #2192798) also operates from Loysville - potential affiliate or family branch.
fit_notes: Tiny husband-and-wife operator (~7 buses) in West Perry SD area; succession-ready owner profile but standalone scale is too small for a true tuck-in. Only attractive if rolled up with neighboring Perry County micro-operators (including affiliated B & L Buses) into a Central PA cluster.
